summary: Doctor now (a) flags a .myfreshworks.com BaseURL as the Freshworks unified-org dashboard, not the Freshservice API tenant, and (b) issues an authenticated GET /agents/me probe with explicit branches for 401/403/404 and for the dashboard's HTML-200 response.
reason: Users routinely paste their org dashboard subdomain (e.g. `<org>.myfreshworks.com`) when prompted for FRESHSERVICE_DOMAIN. That host returns the dashboard SPA's HTML with HTTP 200 for every API path, which the generator's reachability-only doctor treated as a successful API call — every downstream command then failed with confusing JSON-parse errors instead of an obvious 'wrong host' verdict.
validated_outcome: doctor now prints `domain_hint: FAIL: ... looks like the Freshworks unified-org dashboard` and `credentials: FAIL: /agents/me returned HTML, not JSON` when the wrong subdomain is configured; previously printed `api: reachable` and `credentials: OK`.
